image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: Science has a clearer story about astrocytes roles than social media does.
Context visual: Astrocytes are star-shaped cells in your brain, but they do way more than just look pretty.
Escalation visual: They regulate blood flow, support neurons, and maintain the blood-brain barrier.
Evidence visual: Studies show astrocytes can even influence your mood and cognition by releasing chemicals.
Payoff visual: But remember, research is ongoing. Their full potential is still a mystery.
Cta visual: Want to unlock more brain secrets? Hit follow for more science insights!
